data.title: The Algorand Foundation is returning to the United States, with its headquarters to be located in Delaware and new board members appointed.
data.description: After operating in Singapore for some time, the Algorand Foundation announced its return to the United States, with its headquarters to be located in Delaware. Algorand Foundation CEO Staci Warden also stated that new board members have been appointed, including Abra founder and CEO Bill Barhydt as chairman, and former MoneyGram CEO Alex Holmes, former acting director of the Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN), Michael Mosier, among others. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Solana: Starknet has only 8 daily active users and a daily transaction volume of only 10.
data.description: Solana posted on the X platform: "Starknet has only 8 daily active users and 10 daily transactions, yet it still has a market capitalization of $1 billion and an FDV of $15 billion."

data.title: Moonbirds' parent company announces "Birbillions" strategy: targeting Pop Mart, aiming for $1 billion in physical revenue.
data.description: Orange Cap Games (OCG), the parent company of Moonbirds, officially released the "Birbillions Thesis" white paper, proposing a hybrid business model of "physical collectibles + crypto memes." The white paper points out that the core pain point in the crypto industry lies in the disconnect between "serious companies" and "absurd memes." OCG aims to capture the attention of non-crypto users through physical toy distribution (via channels such as Asmodee and GTS), using the $BIRB token as a value coordination layer. Data shows that OCG's physical revenue reached $8 million in its second year of operation. The argument claims that its goal is to become the first crypto-native consumer company to achieve $1 billion in annual revenue through physical sales, without relying on transaction fees or token dumping.

data.title: Canaan Technology: In 2025, it held a total of 1,750 BTC and 3,951 ETH.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Canaan Creative released its unaudited Bitcoin mining operations update for December, disclosing that the company mined 86 BTC in December and expanded its online hashrate to 9.91 EH/s, reaching an operating hashrate of 7.65 EH/s at the end of the month. The company also projected to hold a total of 1,750 BTC and 3,951 ETH for the entire year of 2025. (PRNewswire)

data.title: UK Rolls Back Digital ID Plan for Work Checks Following Public Opposition
data.description:
The UK government has rolled back its mandatory digital ID plan for workers after public opposition surged, forcing a policy retreat ahead of a planned 2029 rollout.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uk-rolls-back-digital-id-plan-for-work-checks-following-public-opposition/

data.title: Senate Crypto Bill Hands Treasury “Patriot Act–Style” Surveillance Powers — Galaxy Sounds Alarm
data.description:
Galaxy Research warns that the Senate’s draft crypto market structure bill could hand the U. S. Treasury broad surveillance powers over DeFi, drawing comparisons to the Patriot Act.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/senate-crypto-bill-treasury-patriot-act-surveillance-powers-galaxy/

data.title: Crossmint Secures MiCA License for Crypto Services Across EU
data.description:
According to Odaily, Crossmint, a provider of crypto payment infrastructure, has received the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) license from the Spanish Securities Market Commission (CNMV). This authorization allows Crossmint to operate as a compliant crypto asset service provider (CASP) across all 27 European Union member states, offering stablecoin infrastructure services.

The license covers three main CASP activities: bidirectional exchange between fiat and cryptocurrencies, custodial services for crypto assets, and cross-wallet and cross-blockchain transfer services. Crossmint co-founder Rodri Fernández Touza noted that with the MiCA transition period ending in July, many remittance companies, payment platforms, and emerging banks are now seeking partners with MiCA licenses. Non-compliant providers may face the risk of being forced out of the market.

data.title: Deribit, Coinbase's cryptocurrency derivatives platform, launches TRX options.
data.description: Coinbase's crypto derivatives platform, Deribit, has launched TRX options. For eligible Deribit users in certain jurisdictions, the newly launched options offer two daily expiration options, two weekly expiration options, one monthly expiration option, and one quarterly expiration option, further expanding the application of institutional-grade derivatives within the TRON ecosystem. (The Block)

data.title: Bitnomial launches the first regulated APT futures contract in the United States.
data.description: Chicago-based derivatives exchange Bitnomial announced the launch of the first regulated APT futures product in the United States. The product will initially be available to institutional traders and will be available to retail investors “in the coming weeks” through the Botanical retail trading platform. (Theblock)

data.title: Noise raises $7.1 million in seed funding, led by Paradigm.
data.description: Noise, an attention marketplace tool building a prediction market information platform, announced the completion of a $7.1 million seed funding round led by Paradigm. The company had previously secured investments from Figment Capital, Anagram, GSR, JPEG Trading, and KaitoAI. Noise's testnet, launched last May and exclusively by invitation, attracted over 1,300 users who used social media data provided by Kaito to place bets on 14 attention marketplaces tracking cryptocurrency topics. (The Block)

data.title: Crossmint has received a license from the Spanish MiCA to provide stablecoin infrastructure services in 27 EU countries.
data.description: Crossmint, a cryptocurrency payment infrastructure provider, has received a license from the Spanish Securities and Markets Commission (CNMV) under the Crypto Asset Market Regulation Act (MiCA), becoming a compliant Crypto Asset Service Provider (CASP). This license allows Crossmint to provide stablecoin infrastructure services in all 27 EU member states. The license covers three core CASP services: fiat-to-crypto exchange, custodial crypto assets, and cross-wallet and cross-blockchain transfer services. Crossmint co-founder Rodri Fernández Touza stated that with the MiCA transition period ending in July, many remittance companies, payment platforms, and emerging banks are now requiring MiCA-licensed partners, and non-compliant providers may face the risk of being forced out of the market. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs on rollercoaster as traditional funds pull in $46B in 2026
data.description:
Bitcoin ETF flows have swung sharply in early 2026 as investors pour billions into traditional ETFs, leaving crypto funds lagging behind.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-etfs-rollercoaster-tradfi-etfs-2026-abnormally-high-46b?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: MANTRA cuts staff amid restructuring as OM token remains 99% below peak
data.description:
MANTRA said it cut staff as part of a restructuring amid a prolonged downturn that has left its OM token about 99% below peak.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/385553/mantra-cuts-staff?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Blockchain real estate technology company Titl has raised $2.5 million in seed funding, led by FIT Ventures and others.
data.description: Blockchain real estate technology company Titl announced the completion of a $2.5 million seed funding round, led by Cofounders Capital and FIT Ventures. The company primarily utilizes artificial intelligence and blockchain technology for title verification. The new funding will support its business expansion, which is expected to extend to 20 U.S. states by the end of the year. (PRNewswire)

data.title: US Republicans: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell may miss his biannual congressional hearings.
data.description: According to a prominent Republican lawmaker, Powell may miss his scheduled next congressional hearing because the Justice Department has subpoenaed the Federal Reserve, threatening criminal charges against Fed Chairman Jerome Powell. Under the 1978 amendments to the law establishing the Federal Reserve, the Fed chairman is required to testify twice a year before Congress, offering his views on monetary policy and the economic situation. By convention, the Fed chairman typically testifies separately before the Senate Banking Committee and the House Financial Services Committee. Representative French Hill, chairman of the House Financial Services Committee, stated, "I expect Chairman Powell will not appear at the House and Senate hearings in February because of the grand jury indictment of him for perjury." (Jin Shi)

data.title: Bitwise launches Chainlink ETF on NYSE Arca
data.description: Bitwise has launched the Bitwise Chainlink ETF, ticker symbol CLNK, on ​​NYSE Arca, a subsidiary of the New York Stock Exchange Group. Chainlink provides the necessary oracle infrastructure to bridge the gap between on-chain smart contracts and off-chain data sources. (The Block)

data.title: Stablecoin Market Share Hits an All-Time High of 10.19%
data.description:
Just three months after their market cap surpassed $300 billion for the first time amid the crypto rebound, stablecoins have set another record. While their market share had historically hovered around 7 to 9. 8%, even during strong growth, that ceiling was finally broken in early 2026. According to data from TechGaged
source: https://www.techgaged.com/stablecoins-market-share-hit-an-all-time-high-of-10-19/

data.title: Morning Minute: Financial Advisors Are More Bullish Crypto Than Ever
data.description:
Allocations are up, personal holdings are up and recommendations are up across the board according to the latest Bitwise survey.
source: https://decrypt.co/354555/morning-minute-financial-advisors-are-more-bullish-crypto-than-ever

data.title: Amazon Gets $315 Target as Advertising Momentum Strengthens for 2026
data.description:
Shares of Amazon. com, Inc. closed lower on January 13, 2026, even as Wall Street turned more bullish on the company’s medium-term outlook. The stock finished the session at $242
source: https://www.ethnews.com/amazon-gets-315-target-as-advertising-momentum-strengthens-for-2026/
